title: Discord.js bot locale schema
description: Locale format used in Discord.js bots produced by Polda18/CZghost
$comment: Locale JSON file should be named following ISO standard for language identification and country designation (like en-US or cs-CZ)

id.description: Identificator of this locale file in ISO 630 format with country designation

name.description: Name of the locale language native to that language, complete with country designation

locale_strings.description: Locale strings structured into a JSON object with nested categories
